description: Count of items expired or expiring within the soon window. Press to open the expiring list and refresh.
label: Expiring
name: expiring

description: Count of scanned items waiting to be committed. Press to open the pending list and refresh.
label: Pending
name: pending

description: Commit every pending scan into the inventory.
label: Commit
name: commit

description: Open the Manage Pantry page on the attached display.
label: Pantry
name: add

description: Open the inventory dashboard on the attached display.
label: Stock
name: inventory

description: Open the recipe suggestions page on the attached display.
label: Cook
name: cook

description: Open the Recipes page.
label: Recipes
name: recipes

description: Open the Meal Plan page.
label: Plan
name: mealplan

description: Open the Shopping list page.
label: Shop
name: shopping

description: Open the storage Defaults page.
label: Defaults
name: defaults

description: Cycle the deck brightness.
label: Bright
name: brightness

description: Show the next page of keys.
label: More
name: page_next

description: Show the previous page of keys.
label: Back
name: page_prev

description: Switch the deck into a numeric keypad to unlock the PIN-locked app, then return to the normal layout.
label: Unlock
name: pin

description: Shared countdown timer (press to cycle: 5/10/15/30/60 min or stop; hold to reset). Shows on every screen too.
label: Timer 1
name: timer_1

description: Second independent countdown timer.
label: Timer 2
name: timer_2

description: Third independent countdown timer.
label: Timer 3
name: timer_3

description: Current weather from wttr.in. Configure location and units in config.toml. Press to refresh. No API key required.
label: Weather
name: weather

description: Today's high/low from wttr.in. Shares the weather fetch. Press to refresh. No API key required.
label: Forecast
name: forecast

description: Home Assistant entity slot 1. Configure in config.toml.
label: HA 1
name: ha_1

description: Home Assistant entity slot 2. Configure in config.toml.
label: HA 2
name: ha_2

description: Home Assistant entity slot 3. Configure in config.toml.
label: HA 3
name: ha_3

description: Home Assistant entity slot 4. Configure in config.toml.
label: HA 4
name: ha_4

description: Home Assistant entity slot 5. Configure in config.toml.
label: HA 5
name: ha_5

description: Current time (HH:MM) and date, updated every second. Pure local clock, no network.
label: Clock
name: clock

description: Count of items on the Mealie shopping list. Press to open the shopping list and refresh.
label: Shop
name: shopping_count

description: How many recipes are cookable from current stock alone. Press to open the Cook page and refresh.
label: Ready
name: ready

description: Today's planned meal from the meal plan. Press to open the Meal Plan page.
label: Tonight
name: meal_today

description: Mark the active Current Recipe as cooked, consuming its matched inventory items. No-op when no recipe is active.
label: Cooked
name: cooked

description: Preset 6-minute timer for soft-boiled eggs.
label: Eggs
name: timer_eggs

description: Preset 10-minute pasta timer.
label: Pasta
name: timer_pasta

description: Preset 18-minute rice timer.
label: Rice
name: timer_rice

description: Halve the active Current Recipe's serving scale. No-op when no recipe is active.
label: 0.5x
name: scale_half

description: Reset the active Current Recipe to its original scale. No-op when no recipe is active.
label: 1x
name: scale_1x

description: Double the active Current Recipe's serving scale. No-op when no recipe is active.
label: 2x
name: scale_2x

description: Blank the kiosk display now (via the host bridge).
label:
Screen
Off
name: screen_off

description: Wake the kiosk display now (via the host bridge).
label:
Screen
On
name: screen_on

description: Pi power/thermal/disk health from the host bridge. Green when clear, amber when warnings are present. Press to open Setup.
label: Health
name: health

description: Open the unit-conversion page on the attached display.
label: Convert
name: convert

description: Open the shared timers page on the attached display.
label: Timers
name: timers_view

description: Restart the kiosk browser (via the host bridge).
label: Kiosk
name: kiosk_restart

description: Pull and redeploy the latest app + Stream Deck (host bridge OTA). Best-effort: the request is fired and the deck does not block.
label: Update
name: update

description: Reboot the host (via the host bridge). Best-effort: the request is fired and the deck does not block.
label: Reboot
name: reboot

description: Live camera snapshot. The key face shows the latest frame; press to open the full feed on the attached display.
label: Camera
name: camera

description: Take over the whole deck with a single live camera frame sliced across every key. Press any key to exit.
label:
Camera
Full
name: camera_full

description: Cycle the barcode scanner mode (Stock, Use, Shop, Audit). The same physical scanner then adds to inventory, consumes stock, adds to the shopping list, or counts stock. The key face shows the active mode.
label:
Scan
Mode
name: scan_mode

description: Open a quick-check page whose keys are the top items on the Mealie shopping list. Press an item to check it off (handy while unpacking groceries). A Back key returns to the normal layout.
label:
Check
Off
name: shopping_check

description: Leave this key blank.
label: Empty
name: blank
